scenarios.title: At a Restaurant
scenarios.context_zh: 使用者在餐廳點餐，練習詢問、點菜與確認。

turns.ai_prompt: Greet the customer and ask what they want.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Welcome! What would you like to order?

turns.ai_prompt: Ask if the user wants a drink.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Would you like something to drink?
Great. One chicken set and water. Is that correct?
Perfect. Your meal will be ready soon. Thank you!
